headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -52.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 59% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 115 quotes and 82 at strong intensity - people are actively venting about issues today.
• The frustration score of 25.8 sits in the lower half of its typical range, despite the high quote volume.
• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism remains deeply negative and stable.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
